l1Processes.title: Sales
l1Processes.description: Lead-to-cash demand and revenue management: capturing demand, qualifying and progressing opportunities, quoting, closing orders, and billing.

l1Processes.title: Customer Service Management
l1Processes.description: End-to-end management of customer support: case intake and routing, SLA and entitlement governance, knowledge management, resolution, and voice-of-customer feedback.

l1Processes.title: Field Service
l1Processes.description: End-to-end management of on-site service delivery: work order intake, scheduling and dispatch, on-site execution, asset servicing, inventory/returns, and agreement-based recurring maintenance.

l1Processes.title: Project Operations
l1Processes.description: End-to-end project-based service delivery: sell, plan, resource, deliver, and bill projects with cost/margin control.

l1Processes.title: Marketing
l1Processes.description: End-to-end marketing management: campaign intake, audience segmentation, real-time journey orchestration across channels, event management, lead scoring and handoff, and consent/compliance.

l1Processes.title: Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)
l1Processes.description: End-to-end management of customer data ingestion, unification, enrichment, measures/predictions, segmentation, and privacy governance across all Contoso source systems.

l1Processes.title: Finance
l1Processes.description: End-to-end financial management for Contoso: general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, budgeting, fixed assets, and tax/compliance, surfaced through Dataverse via dual-write with D365 Finance.

l1Processes.title: Supply Chain Management
l1Processes.description: End-to-end plan-to-produce and procure-to-receive operations spanning demand planning, procurement, inventory, warehousing, production visibility, and outbound logistics for Contoso, integrated with D365 Finance & Operations via dual-write and virtual entities.

l1Processes.title: Commerce & Omnichannel Retail
l1Processes.description: End-to-end retail commerce operations spanning channel setup, product assortment and pricing, in-store and online transaction capture, loyalty and rewards, gift cards, and statement settlement / back-office reconciliation across POS, call center, and e-commerce channels. Built on Dynamics 365 Commerce (F&O runtime) with tables surfaced to Dataverse via dual-write and virtual entities.

l1Processes.title: Human Resources
l1Processes.description: Manage the workforce lifecycle at Contoso from hire to retire — organizational structure, employment, compensation, leave and absence, performance, and employee relations across all legal entities.

l1Processes.title: Contact Center / Omnichannel Engagement
l1Processes.description: End-to-end management of omnichannel customer interactions from channel entry through routing, agent handling, and post-interaction quality and cost governance.

l1Processes.title: Platform & Governance
l1Processes.description: Cross-cutting Center-of-Excellence governance of the Contoso Power Platform / Dataverse estate: environment lifecycle, ALM, security, data protection and maker compliance.

l2Processes.title: Lead Management
l2Processes.description: Capture, score, route, and qualify inbound and marketing-sourced leads.

l2Processes.title: Opportunity Management
l2Processes.description: Progress qualified opportunities through the sales stages with playbook guidance and competitor tracking.

l2Processes.title: Quote & Order Management
l2Processes.description: Configure pricing, obtain deal-desk approval, generate quotes, and convert to orders and invoices.

l2Processes.title: Sales Performance Management
l2Processes.description: Set goals and territories and measure attainment across the sales organization.

l2Processes.title: Case Intake & Routing
l2Processes.description: Multichannel case capture, entitlement matching, queue assignment, and SLA application.

l2Processes.title: Case Resolution & Escalation
l2Processes.description: Investigation, knowledge-assisted resolution, escalation handling, and case closure.

l2Processes.title: Knowledge Management
l2Processes.description: Authoring, reviewing, publishing, and retiring knowledge articles for agents and self-service.

l2Processes.title: Voice of Customer & Continuous Improvement
l2Processes.description: CSAT/NPS survey distribution, sentiment analysis, and service quality reporting.

l2Processes.title: Work Order Management
l2Processes.description: Create, estimate, and close work orders from incidents, agreements, or IoT alerts.

l2Processes.title: Scheduling & Dispatch
l2Processes.description: Requirement generation, schedule board, RSO optimization, and booking of resources.

l2Processes.title: Asset & Agreement Management
l2Processes.description: Customer asset servicing history and recurring maintenance agreements.

l2Processes.title: Inventory, Returns & Costing
l2Processes.description: Truck stock, warehouse inventory, RMAs, and time-entry based costing.

l2Processes.title: Sell & Estimate
l2Processes.description: Opportunity-to-quote estimating, project contract creation, and contract line setup.

l2Processes.title: Plan & Resource
l2Processes.description: Work breakdown scheduling, team building, and resource fulfillment.

l2Processes.title: Deliver & Capture
l2Processes.description: Execution, time and expense capture, and project health governance.

l2Processes.title: Bill & Recognize
l2Processes.description: Actuals generation, invoicing, and revenue/cost recognition to Finance.

l2Processes.title: Campaign Planning & Intake
l2Processes.description: Capture campaign briefs, secure budget and brand/legal approvals, and stage work for launch.

l2Processes.title: Audience & Journey Orchestration
l2Processes.description: Build segments and triggers, author channel content, and run real-time customer journeys.

l2Processes.title: Event Management
l2Processes.description: Plan events, manage registrations, and drive attendance journeys.

l2Processes.title: Lead Management & Consent
l2Processes.description: Score leads, hand off sales-ready leads, and govern channel consent and marketability.

l2Processes.title: Data Ingestion & Onboarding
l2Processes.description: Register data sources, map entities, assign semantic types, and monitor refresh health.

l2Processes.title: Identity Unification (Match & Merge)
l2Processes.description: Apply match rules to resolve identities into golden unified customer profiles.

l2Processes.title: Insights - Measures, Predictions & Segments
l2Processes.description: Author measures, run ML predictions, and build activatable segments.

l2Processes.title: Consent & Privacy Governance
l2Processes.description: Manage consent, DSR requests, and compliance auditing over unified data.

l2Processes.title: General Ledger & Close
l2Processes.description: Chart of accounts, journal posting, financial dimensions, and period-end close.

l2Processes.title: Accounts Payable
l2Processes.description: Vendor invoice capture, multi-tier approval, and payment posting.

l2Processes.title: Accounts Receivable & Collections
l2Processes.description: Customer payments, credit management, and dunning/collections.

l2Processes.title: Budgeting & Fixed Assets
l2Processes.description: Budget register control, capex requests, and fixed-asset lifecycle.

l2Processes.title: Demand Planning & Forecasting
l2Processes.description: Generate and reconcile demand forecasts, apply DDMRP buffers, and feed F&O master planning.

l2Processes.title: Procure to Receive
l2Processes.description: Requisition intake, vendor selection, purchase order creation in F&O, and goods receipt.

l2Processes.title: Inventory & Warehouse Management
l2Processes.description: Cycle counting, inventory adjustments, and warehouse operations synchronized with F&O WHS.

l2Processes.title: Outbound Logistics & Fulfillment
l2Processes.description: Shipment creation, carrier assignment, tracking, and delivery confirmation against sales orders.

l2Processes.title: Production Visibility
l2Processes.description: Surface F&O production orders and BOM component data for shop-floor status monitoring and engineering-change review.

l2Processes.title: Channel & Store Management
l2Processes.description: Configure retail channels (stores, online, call center), terminals/registers, channel profiles, and functionality profiles that drive POS behavior and Commerce Scale Unit connectivity.

l2Processes.title: Assortment, Pricing & Promotions
l2Processes.description: Manage catalog assortments, price groups, trade agreements, discounts and promotional pricing rules distributed to channels via channel data publish (job 1070).

l2Processes.title: Transaction Capture & Settlement
l2Processes.description: Capture retail sales transactions and tender lines at the point of sale, then aggregate into statements, post, and reconcile to finance.

l2Processes.title: Loyalty & Customer Engagement
l2Processes.description: Enroll customers into loyalty programs, issue loyalty and gift cards, accrue and redeem reward points across channels.

l2Processes.title: Organization & Position Management
l2Processes.description: Maintain departments, jobs, and positions and the reporting hierarchy that workers are assigned to.

l2Processes.title: Hire to Onboard
l2Processes.description: Recruit, hire, and onboard new workers including checklist orchestration and system provisioning.

l2Processes.title: Time & Absence Management
l2Processes.description: Enroll workers in leave plans and process leave requests, approvals, and balances.

l2Processes.title: Performance & Compensation
l2Processes.description: Run performance review cycles and manage fixed/variable compensation and merit planning.

l2Processes.title: Employee Relations
l2Processes.description: Manage grievances and disciplinary cases with confidential, audited access restricted to ER specialists.

l2Processes.title: Channel & Routing Configuration
l2Processes.description: Configure channels, work streams, queues, presence, and routing rules that direct conversations to the right agent.

l2Processes.title: Conversation Handling
l2Processes.description: Live agent handling of conversations across sessions including consult, transfer, and wrap-up.

l2Processes.title: Deflection & Automation
l2Processes.description: Bot/Copilot self-service containment and escalation from automated to agent channels.

l2Processes.title: Quality & Workforce Governance
l2Processes.description: Sentiment monitoring, agent adherence, coaching/calibration, and channel cost governance.

l2Processes.title: Environment & Capacity Management
l2Processes.description: Provision, quarantine and decommission environments; monitor capacity and DLP policy assignment.

l2Processes.title: Application Lifecycle Management (ALM)
l2Processes.description: Manage solutions, publishers, connection references and environment variables across dev/test/prod.

l2Processes.title: Security & Access Governance
l2Processes.description: Administer business units, teams, security roles and field security profiles under least-privilege.

l2Processes.title: Data Protection & Compliance
l2Processes.description: Maintain the data processing register, consent, sensitivity classification and maker attestations.

l3Processes.title: Lead Capture & Scoring
l3Processes.description: Ingest leads from web/campaign sources and apply Contoso lead scoring.

l3Processes.title: Lead Qualification
l3Processes.description: Qualify leads and convert to opportunity via the business process flow.

l3Processes.title: Opportunity Progression
l3Processes.description: Advance opportunities through the Qualify/Develop/Propose/Close stages.

l3Processes.title: Deal Desk Approval
l3Processes.description: Route non-standard discounts through deal-desk review before quoting.

l3Processes.title: Order & Invoice Fulfillment
l3Processes.description: Convert won quotes to orders and invoices with F&O settlement visibility.

l3Processes.title: Multichannel Case Capture
l3Processes.description: Create cases from phone, email, web, chat, and Omnichannel sessions.

l3Processes.title: Entitlement & SLA Application
l3Processes.description: Match customer to entitlement, decrement terms, and apply the governing SLA.

l3Processes.title: Tiered Escalation Handling
l3Processes.description: Escalate complex or SLA-at-risk cases to tier-2/3 and notify management.

l3Processes.title: Article Review & Publish
l3Processes.description: Compliance review, versioning, and publishing of knowledge articles.

l3Processes.title: Work Order Intake & Triage
l3Processes.description: Capture the problem via incident types and prioritize.

l3Processes.title: Estimate & Quote
l3Processes.description: Add products/services and price the work order.

l3Processes.title: Resource Requirement & Optimization
l3Processes.description: Generate requirements and run Resource Scheduling Optimization.

l3Processes.title: Recurring Maintenance Generation
l3Processes.description: Agreement booking setups auto-create scheduled maintenance work orders.

l3Processes.title: Build Project Schedule
l3Processes.description: Author WBS tasks, dependencies, and effort estimates.

l3Processes.title: Fulfill Staffing Requests
l3Processes.description: Convert generic requirements to booked resources via the resourcing desk.

l3Processes.title: Capture Time & Expense
l3Processes.description: Submit, approve, and post resource time and expenses to actuals.

l3Processes.title: Generate Project Invoice
l3Processes.description: Produce invoices from confirmed actuals and contract billing schedules.

l3Processes.title: Segment Building
l3Processes.description: Define behavioral/demographic segments and static lists targeting contacts and leads.

l3Processes.title: Journey Authoring & Publish
l3Processes.description: Configure triggers, steps, and channels, then publish and monitor real-time journeys.

l3Processes.title: Lead Scoring & Handoff
l3Processes.description: Apply scoring models and hand sales-ready leads to sales routing.

l3Processes.title: Consent & Preference Management
l3Processes.description: Maintain contact point consent and suppression across channels.

l3Processes.title: Register & Configure Data Source
l3Processes.description: Onboard a new source with connection and refresh schedule.

l3Processes.title: Map Entities & Semantic Types
l3Processes.description: Map source attributes to CI-Data model and semantic types.

l3Processes.title: Author & Version Match Rules
l3Processes.description: Define deterministic/fuzzy match-rule overrides.

l3Processes.title: Build & Activate Segment
l3Processes.description: Define audience criteria, verify consent, and export to channels.

l3Processes.title: Process DSR Request
l3Processes.description: Handle data-subject delete/export requests with propagation.

l3Processes.title: Vendor Invoice Approval Routing
l3Processes.description: Route AP approval requests by amount threshold across manager/controller/CFO tiers.

l3Processes.title: Credit Risk & Dunning
l3Processes.description: Assess credit risk rating and execute dunning escalation on overdue balances.

l3Processes.title: Capex to Asset Provisioning
l3Processes.description: Budget-check capex requests and provision approved fixed assets.

l3Processes.title: Requisition Approval
l3Processes.description: Multi-stage approval of purchase requisitions before PO generation in F&O.

l3Processes.title: Vendor Onboarding & Qualification
l3Processes.description: Approve and qualify new suppliers and sync them to the F&O vendor master.

l3Processes.title: Cycle Count Execution
l3Processes.description: Mobile cycle-count sessions posting variances to F&O inventory journals after review.

l3Processes.title: Carrier Assignment & Tracking
l3Processes.description: Assign carriers and track shipments through delivery with customer notification.

l3Processes.title: Store & Terminal Provisioning
l3Processes.description: Create retail stores and register POS terminals, bind them to channel and functionality profiles.

l3Processes.title: Price & Discount Distribution
l3Processes.description: Author pricing rules and discounts, then publish channel data to the Retail Server / Commerce Scale Unit.

l3Processes.title: Statement Posting & Reconciliation
l3Processes.description: Aggregate retail transactions into statements, calculate, and post to Finance for settlement.

l3Processes.title: Loyalty Accrual & Redemption
l3Processes.description: Award reward points on qualifying transactions and redeem at tender.

l3Processes.title: Worker Creation & Employment Setup
l3Processes.description: Create the worker and employment record, assign to a position, and set probation terms.

l3Processes.title: Onboarding Checklist Execution
l3Processes.description: Generate and complete onboarding tasks, provision accounts, and confirm readiness.

l3Processes.title: Leave Request & Approval
l3Processes.description: Submit, validate against balances, and approve/reject leave requests through the BPF.

l3Processes.title: Performance Review Cycle
l3Processes.description: Initiate review cycles, capture ratings and calibration, and feed merit recommendations.

l3Processes.title: Disciplinary Case Handling
l3Processes.description: Open, investigate, and resolve disciplinary cases with audit logging and restricted owner-level access.

l3Processes.title: Route & Assign Conversation
l3Processes.description: Match a conversation to a queue and agent based on capacity, skills, and priority score.

l3Processes.title: Consult & Transfer
l3Processes.description: Bring additional participants into a session or hand off the conversation.

l3Processes.title: Bot Containment & Escalation
l3Processes.description: Resolve via bot or knowledge deflection; escalate to a live agent with logged outcome.

l3Processes.title: Coaching & Calibration
l3Processes.description: Supervisor QA scoring and calibration of coaching notes against sampled conversations.

l3Processes.title: Environment Request & Provisioning
l3Processes.description: Intake, approval and provisioning of new environments via the onboarding BPF.

l3Processes.title: Environment Decommission & Quarantine
l3Processes.description: Retire or quarantine orphaned/non-compliant environments.

l3Processes.title: Solution Promotion (Dev to Prod)
l3Processes.description: Pipeline-driven managed solution import with connection-reference and env-variable binding.

l3Processes.title: Role & Privilege Review
l3Processes.description: Periodic audit of over-privileged and custom security roles.

l3Processes.title: Maker Compliance Attestation
l3Processes.description: Recurring app/flow ownership and compliance attestation cycle.
